agenda_descriptions:
Purchase w/c/b - From Equalis Group-Cooperative Council of Governments (CCOG)
services to replace the Field Turf at Clary (Valley) Practice Field. Total amount not to
exceed $890,695 from Budget H-16200-000-2590-000-04535-994125, on behalf of
the Syracuse City School District (SCSD).

segments.title: ACA Filing Fee Waiver -- BPASS/One Group Federal Compliance Submission
segments.summary: HR representative Richard presents waiver for late-filed ACA compliance submission. One Group (BPASS parent company) handles ACA data tracking and compilation; filing fee covers per-head submission to federal government. Council President confirms she was pre-briefed and supports pushing the waiver through.
processing_notes: ACA = Affordable Care Act. BPASS parent company is One Group. Fee is per-head for federal filing. Agenda description references SCSD field turf (item 10) but segment content is about ACA waiver (supplemental item 10).

segments.title: Transition and Item Confirmations -- Committee Handoffs
segments.summary: Brief procedural segment confirming item 11 is ready and transitioning between committee chairs. No substantive policy discussion. Councilor Ehrenreich and Councilor Jones-Rowser referenced picking up their items.
processing_notes: Transcript heavily garbled during this transition. Minimal substance. Speaker attributions are low confidence due to poor audio.

agenda_descriptions:
Amend — Ord. #498 (06/23/2025), “Bond Ordinance — Authorizing the issuance and
sale of bonds of the City of Syracuse to defray the cost of the Scoping, Preliminary,
Right of Way Acquisition, Detailed Design, and Construction & Construction
Inspection Phases PIN 3757.

Amend - The Revised General Ordinances of the City of Syracuse, Chapter 14,
Article 1, Section 14.1 as last amended by General Ordinance #20-2023, relative to
granting a partial exemption from real property taxation for persons with limited
income who are 65 years of age or over.

segments.title: Items 27-30 Ready, Parkside and Flock Held, 1153 AV Bond Clarification
segments.summary: Councilor Jones-Rowser confirms items 27-30 are ready for Monday vote. Items 31 (Parkside Commons) and 32 (Flock ALPR) continue to be held. Item 33: Michael Layman (Assessment) clarifies the 1153 West Fayette AV/FFE items are tangible bondable goods, distinct from the $343K cash capital police moving expenses. Session adjourns with no executive session.
processing_notes: Very short session -- mostly confirmations of items discussed at Mar 4 study session. Items 31-32 continue to be held from multiple prior sessions.
